disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Cough, rhinorrhoea and conjunctivitis present alongside the sore throat
trigger_question_examples: Do you also have a cough, runny nose or red/sore eyes?
Can you tell me a bit more about that?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — I've had a cough, a runny nose and my eyes have been red and sore.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Can still open mouth fully, no muffled 'hot-potato' voice, no one-sided throat swelling, no drooling
trigger_question_examples: Can you open your mouth fully?
Any one-sided swelling in the throat or drooling?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can open my mouth okay, my voice is normal, no one-sided swelling and I'm not drooling.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Signs of dehydration risk — no oral intake all day, weakness; monitor urine output/dizziness
trigger_question_examples: How much have you managed to drink and pass urine today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I haven't drunk anything all day and I've barely passed urine; I feel a bit lightheaded standing up.
